cases.description: User starts a feature with no plan; agent enters mode wide and respects HARD GATE
cases.prompt: I want to add an export-to-CSV feature but I haven't thought through the design.
expectations: Skill discover is selected
Mode wide is chosen
Agent asks ONE question at a time
Each question includes a recommended answer the user can accept or override
Agent does NOT write code, scaffold, or propose phase transitions before the user explicitly approves the design (HARD GATE)
Agent presents 2-3 approaches with trade-offs before committing to one

cases.description: User has a plan and needs branch-by-branch convergence
cases.prompt: I have docs/[PLAN]_auth.md but I'm uncertain about the session strategy and the rate-limiting approach.
expectations: Skill discover is selected
Mode sharpen is chosen (not wide)
Agent walks the decision tree branch by branch — session, then rate-limiting
Each question includes a recommended answer with reasoning
Agent does NOT propose implementing until decisions are resolved

cases.description: User has a plan AND docs/CONTEXT.md exists; mode domain stress-tests vocabulary against the glossary
cases.prompt: Here's my plan for the new pricing system. Check it against our docs/CONTEXT.md and ADRs.
expectations: Skill discover is selected
Mode domain is chosen
Agent reads docs/CONTEXT.md before asking questions
Agent reads relevant docs/adr/* before asking questions
Agent surfaces vocabulary mismatches between the plan and CONTEXT.md
Agent updates CONTEXT.md inline when fuzzy terms get sharpened
Agent offers to record load-bearing decisions as ADRs (triple test applies)

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user asks 'just give me all your questions at once'
cases.prompt: Just ask all your questions in one message, I'll answer them in a single response. Don't drag this out.
expectations: Agent refuses to bundle questions
Agent explains: ONE question at a time produces sharper decisions
Agent does not cave under time pressure
Agent asks the highest-priority question first with a recommended answer

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user pushes for an open question without a recommended answer
cases.prompt: Just ask me what to do, don't suggest answers. I want fresh thinking.
expectations: Agent refuses to ask without a recommendation
Agent explains: a recommended answer is the agent's contribution; without it the user does all the thinking
Agent provides the recommendation even if the user prefers raw questions

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user pushes to start coding mid-discovery
cases.prompt: OK that's enough discussion, just start writing the code. We're running out of time.
expectations: Agent refuses to write code before explicit design approval (HARD GATE)
Agent summarizes what has been agreed and what is still open
Agent asks the user to either approve the design or specify the remaining decisions
